PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Jochem\\AppData\\Local" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match -join\("aleca","frame"\) -or $_.Name -match "Aleca" } | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "Aleca" } | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "Aleca" } | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\Jochem\\AppData\\Local\\AlecaFrame\\relicLogs\\2026_04_29_19_27_34_RELIC.alecalog"\); $stream = [System.IO.MemoryStream]::new\($bytes\); $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipArchive]::new\($stream\); $zip.Entries | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table)

PowerShell(foreach \($ext in \(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Overwolf\\Extensions"\)\) { $manifest = "$\($ext.FullName\)\\manifest.json"; if \(Test-Path $manifest\) { $content = Get-Content $manifest -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($content -match "aleca" -or $content -match "AlecaFrame" -or $content -match "Warframe" -or $content -match "warframe"\) { Write-Output "$\($ext.Name\): $\($content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $content.Length\)\)\)"; break } } })

PowerShell(foreach \($ext in \(Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Overwolf\\Extensions"\)\) { $dirs = Get-ChildItem $ext.FullName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($d in $dirs\) { $manifest = "$\($d.FullName\)\\manifest.json"; if \(Test-Path $manifest\) { $content = Get-Content $manifest -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($content -match "aleca" -or $content -match "Warframe" -or $content -match "warframe"\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $\($d.FullName\)"; Write-Output $content.Substring\(0, 300\) } } } })

PowerShell($dll = "C:\\Users\\Jochem\\AppData\\Local\\Overwolf\\Extensions\\afmcagbpgggkpdkokjhjkllpegnadmkignlonpjm\\2.6.86\\NET\\AlecaFrameClientLib.dll"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($dll\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\); $matches = [regex]::Matches\($text, '[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9 /\\._\\-\\[\\]{}]{6,120}'\); $matches | ForEach-Object { $_.Value } | Where-Object { $_ -match "Got reward|OpenVoid|Relic reward|fissure reward|VoidFissure|initialized relic|reward screen|Void Fissure reward|InterimReward|interim" } | Sort-Object -Unique)

PowerShell($dll = "C:\\Users\\Jochem\\AppData\\Local\\Overwolf\\Extensions\\afmcagbpgggkpdkokjhjkllpegnadmkignlonpjm\\2.6.86\\NET\\AlecaFrameClientLib.dll"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($dll\); # Find all printable ASCII strings >= 10 chars $strings = @\(\); $i = 0; $start = -1; while \($i -lt $bytes.Length\) { $b = $bytes[$i]; if \($b -ge 32 -and $b -le 126\) { if \($start -eq -1\) { $start = $i }; } else { if \($start -ne -1 -and \($i - $start\) -ge 10\) { $s = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes, $start, $i - $start\); if \($s -match "EE\\.log|Lotus|reward|relic|fissure|screenshot|OCR|vision|text" -and $s.Length -lt 300\) { $strings += $s } }; $start = -1 }; $i++ }; $strings | Sort-Object -Unique | Select-Object -First 80)

PowerShell($dll = "C:\\Users\\Jochem\\AppData\\Local\\Overwolf\\Extensions\\afmcagbpgggkpdkokjhjkllpegnadmkignlonpjm\\2.6.86\\NET\\AlecaFramePublicLib.dll"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($dll\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $lines = $text -split "`n" | Where-Object { $_ -match "EE\\.log|Lotus|Got reward|OpenVoid|fissure|screenshot|OCR|Relic reward" -and $_.Length -lt 300 -and $_.Length -gt 5 } | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim\(\) } | Sort-Object -Unique; $lines | Select-Object -First 60)

PowerShell($dll = "C:\\Users\\Jochem\\AppData\\Local\\Overwolf\\Extensions\\afmcagbpgggkpdkokjhjkllpegnadmkignlonpjm\\2.6.86\\NET\\AlecaFrameClientLib.dll"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($dll\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString\($bytes\); \($text -split "`n"\) | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 5 -and $_.Length -lt 300 -and \($_ -match "EE\\.log|Got reward|OpenVoid|Lotus|fissure|reward screen|screenshot|OCR|relic reward" \) } | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim\(\) } | Sort-Object -Unique | Select-Object -First 60)
